name: Decision Engine
role: Autonome Entscheidungen treffen basierend auf Severity Scoring
description: Herzstueck des Live Operations Layers. 3-Dimensionen Severity Scoring (deviation*0.4 + impact*0.35 + velocity*0.25). 5 Aktionstypen: hotfix, patch, feature_update, strategic_pivot, none. Action Queue (Priority, Duplicate Check, Stale Cleanup). Cooling Manager (hotfix=48h, patch=168h, feature_update=336h).
